tools.name: whoami
tools.title: Who am I
tools.description: Return the signed-in SoMA+ user's profile (id, name, email, avatar, job title).

tools.name: get_profile
tools.title: Get profile
tools.description: Fetch any user's public profile (respects RLS).

tools.name: update_profile
tools.title: Update my profile
tools.description: Update the signed-in user's own profile fields.

tools.name: list_my_teams
tools.title: List my teams
tools.description: List the teams the signed-in user belongs to, with role. Start here.

tools.name: get_team
tools.title: Get team
tools.description: Fetch a team by id.

tools.name: list_team_members
tools.title: List team members
tools.description: List members of a team with profile and role.

tools.name: list_team_positions
tools.title: List team positions
tools.description: List the job positions defined for a team.

tools.name: join_team_with_code
tools.title: Join team with access code
tools.description: Join a team using its 20-char access code. User becomes a 'member'.

tools.name: get_plan_limits
tools.title: Get plan limits
tools.description: Fetch the current plan limits for a team (max boards, demands, members, services, notes).

tools.name: list_boards
tools.title: List boards
tools.description: List active boards for a team. Respects RLS — only boards the user can see.

tools.name: get_board
tools.title: Get board
tools.description: Fetch a single board by id.

tools.name: create_board
tools.title: Create board
tools.description: Create a new board in a team. The board is initialized with default statuses.

tools.name: update_board
tools.title: Update board
tools.description: Update board name or description.

tools.name: archive_board
tools.title: Archive board
tools.description: Archive a board (reversible — hides it from active views).

tools.name: list_board_members
tools.title: List board members
tools.description: List members of a board with role (admin, moderator, executor, requester).

tools.name: add_board_member
tools.title: Add board member
tools.description: Add a team user to a board with a specific role.

tools.name: update_board_member_role
tools.title: Update board member role
tools.description: Change a board member's role.

tools.name: remove_board_member
tools.title: Remove board member
tools.description: Remove a user from a board.

tools.name: list_board_statuses
tools.title: List board statuses
tools.description: List the Kanban stages for a board, ordered by position.

tools.name: list_board_services
tools.title: List board services
tools.description: List services attached (authorized) to a board.

tools.name: attach_service_to_board
tools.title: Attach service to board
tools.description: Authorize a service on a board, optionally with a monthly limit.

tools.name: list_demands
tools.title: List demands
tools.description: List demands on a board. Optional filters: status_id, priority, assignee, limit.

tools.name: search_demands
tools.title: Search demands
tools.description: Search demands by title/description across accessible boards. Use to resolve names into IDs.

tools.name: get_demand
tools.title: Get demand
tools.description: Fetch a single demand with its assignees, board and status.

tools.name: create_demand
tools.title: Create demand
tools.description: Create a demand on a board. If status_id is omitted, the board default is used. Optional assignees and AEIOU origin.

aeiou_origin.description: Origem AEIOU: qual pilar do Marketing OS gerou a demanda.

tools.name: update_demand
tools.title: Update demand
tools.description: Update demand fields (title, description, due_date, priority, service_id).

tools.name: move_demand
tools.title: Move demand (change status)
tools.description: Move a demand to a different status column on its board.

tools.name: assign_demand
tools.title: Assign responsible
tools.description: Set the primary responsible for a demand. Any previous primary becomes a follower.

tools.name: add_follower
tools.title: Add follower
tools.description: Add a follower (non-primary assignee) to a demand.

tools.name: remove_follower
tools.title: Remove follower
tools.description: Remove a follower (non-primary) from a demand.

tools.name: add_dependency
tools.title: Add demand dependency
tools.description: Declare that one demand depends on (is blocked by) another.

tools.name: archive_demand
tools.title: Archive demand
tools.description: Archive a demand (reversible — removes from active views).

tools.name: delete_demand
tools.title: Delete demand (irreversible)
tools.description: Permanently delete a demand. Requires the user to have destructive permission.

tools.name: create_demand_with_subdemands
tools.title: Create demand with subdemands
tools.description: Atomically create a parent demand and its subdemands (and optional dependencies) using the SoMA+ RPC.

tools.name: list_subtasks
tools.title: List subtasks
tools.description: List the checklist subtasks for a demand.

tools.name: create_subtask
tools.title: Create subtask
tools.description: Add a checklist item to a demand.

tools.name: toggle_subtask
tools.title: Toggle subtask
tools.description: Mark a subtask as completed or not completed.

tools.name: update_subtask
tools.title: Update subtask
tools.description: Update the title of a subtask.

tools.name: delete_subtask
tools.title: Delete subtask
tools.description: Delete a subtask.

tools.name: list_comments
tools.title: List comments
tools.description: List comments/messages on a demand chat.

tools.name: post_comment
tools.title: Post comment
tools.description: Publish a comment on a demand. Use `internal: true` for internal channel.

internal.description: If true, restricts to internal channel.

tools.name: delete_comment
tools.title: Delete comment
tools.description: Delete a comment (only the author or an admin can).

tools.name: list_attachments
tools.title: List attachments
tools.description: List file attachments on a demand (metadata only).

tools.name: get_attachment_url
tools.title: Get attachment download URL
tools.description: Generate a short-lived signed URL to download an attachment.

tools.name: delete_attachment
tools.title: Delete attachment
tools.description: Delete an attachment (removes both storage object and database record).

tools.name: request_attachment_upload
tools.title: Request attachment upload URL
tools.description: Reserve an attachment record and return a short-lived signed upload URL. After PUT, call `confirm_attachment_upload`.

tools.name: confirm_attachment_upload
tools.title: Confirm attachment upload
tools.description: Persist a completed upload as a demand_attachments record.

tools.name: start_demand_timer
tools.title: Start demand timer
tools.description: Start a timer on a demand for the current user. Any previously running timer for this user is auto-closed.

tools.name: stop_demand_timer
tools.title: Stop demand timer
tools.description: Stop the active timer for the current user (optionally scoped to a demand).

tools.name: get_active_timer
tools.title: Get active timer
tools.description: Return the current user's active timer, if any.

tools.name: list_time_entries
tools.title: List time entries
tools.description: List time entries by demand or user, optionally filtered by date range.

tools.name: log_time_entry
tools.title: Log manual time entry
tools.description: Record a completed time entry manually (started_at/ended_at).

tools.name: list_services
tools.title: List services
tools.description: List services registered by a team (catalog of deliverables).

tools.name: get_service
tools.title: Get service
tools.description: Fetch a service by id.

tools.name: create_service
tools.title: Create service
tools.description: Create a new service in a team catalog.

tools.name: update_service
tools.title: Update service
tools.description: Update a service's fields.

tools.name: delete_service
tools.title: Delete service
tools.description: Delete a service. Fails if the service is referenced by demands.

tools.name: list_notes
tools.title: List notes
tools.description: List notes accessible to the user in a team.

tools.name: get_note
tools.title: Get note
tools.description: Fetch a note by id with its full content.

tools.name: create_note
tools.title: Create note
tools.description: Create a new note (rich text content).

tools.name: update_note
tools.title: Update note
tools.description: Update note title/content/icon/tags.

tools.name: archive_note
tools.title: Archive note
tools.description: Archive a note (reversible).

tools.name: list_projects
tools.title: List projects (folders)
tools.description: List projects (SoMA+ folders) in a team.

tools.name: get_project
tools.title: Get project
tools.description: Fetch a project (folder) by id.

tools.name: create_project
tools.title: Create project
tools.description: Create a new project/folder in a team.

tools.name: link_demand_to_project
tools.title: Link demand to project
tools.description: Add a demand to a project (folder).

tools.name: list_demand_requests
tools.title: List demand requests
tools.description: List demand requests (solicitations) for a team, filterable by status.

tools.name: get_demand_request
tools.title: Get demand request
tools.description: Fetch a demand request by id.

tools.name: create_demand_request
tools.title: Create demand request
tools.description: Create a solicitation. Use when the user is a requester or shouldn't create a demand directly.

tools.name: respond_to_request
tools.title: Respond to demand request
tools.description: Approve, reject or return a demand request for adjustment.

tools.name: list_templates
tools.title: List demand templates
tools.description: List reusable demand templates for a team.

tools.name: get_template
tools.title: Get template
tools.description: Fetch a template by id.

tools.name: create_template
tools.title: Create template
tools.description: Create a reusable demand template.

tools.name: update_template
tools.title: Update template
tools.description: Update fields of a template.

tools.name: delete_template
tools.title: Delete template
tools.description: Delete a template.

tools.name: list_recurring_demands
tools.title: List recurring demands
tools.description: List recurring demand templates for a team.

tools.name: get_recurring_demand
tools.title: Get recurring demand
tools.description: Fetch a recurring demand by id.

tools.name: create_recurring_demand
tools.title: Create recurring demand
tools.description: Set up a recurring demand that auto-generates on a schedule.

tools.name: update_recurring_demand
tools.title: Update recurring demand
tools.description: Update the schedule or fields of a recurring demand.

tools.name: pause_recurring
tools.title: Pause recurring demand
tools.description: Pause a recurring demand (stops generating new demands).

tools.name: resume_recurring
tools.title: Resume recurring demand
tools.description: Resume a paused recurring demand.

tools.name: delete_recurring
tools.title: Delete recurring demand
tools.description: Delete a recurring demand (does not remove already-generated demands).

tools.name: list_notifications
tools.title: List my notifications
tools.description: List the signed-in user's notifications (optionally only unread).

tools.name: mark_notification_read
tools.title: Mark notification as read
tools.description: Mark a single notification as read.

tools.name: mark_all_read
tools.title: Mark all notifications as read
tools.description: Mark every unread notification for the user as read.

tools.name: get_notification_preferences
tools.title: Get notification preferences
tools.description: Fetch the user's notification preferences (channels, deadlines, approvals).

tools.name: update_notification_preferences
tools.title: Update notification preferences
tools.description: Update one or more notification preference keys.

preferences.description: Map of preference_key -> value. Keys: notifications, deadline_reminders, email_notifications, push_notifications.

tools.name: create_demand_share_token
tools.title: Create demand share link
tools.description: Create a public share link for a demand.

tools.name: list_demand_share_tokens
tools.title: List demand share links
tools.description: List existing share tokens for a demand.

tools.name: revoke_demand_share_token
tools.title: Revoke demand share link
tools.description: Revoke (delete) a demand share token.

tools.name: board_summary_stats
tools.title: Board summary stats
tools.description: Return demand counts by status, priority, overdue and delivered for a board.

tools.name: overdue_demands
tools.title: Overdue demands
tools.description: List demands whose deadline has passed and that are not yet delivered.

tools.name: due_soon_demands
tools.title: Due-soon demands
tools.description: List demands due within a window (default 7 days) and not yet delivered.

tools.name: get_operational_snapshot
tools.title: Operational snapshot
tools.description: One-shot aggregated read of a board/team: totals, overdue, due-soon, capacity by user, bottleneck alerts.

tools.name: risk_of_delay
tools.title: Risk of delay
tools.description: Demands at risk of missing their deadline: due-soon, without recent activity, or blocked by dependencies.

tools.name: user_productivity_stats
tools.title: User productivity stats
tools.description: Deliveries and time invested by a user over a period.

tools.name: ping
tools.title: Ping
tools.description: Health check. Returns pong + server timestamp.

tools.name: get_server_version
tools.title: Server version
tools.description: Return MCP server version and canonical documentation URL.

tools.name: list_capabilities
tools.title: List capabilities
tools.description: Enumerate the domains and feature flags exposed by this MCP server. Use for discovery.
